Loova Ads Studio

# Loova Ads Studio

Create AI ads that convert, not just look good

## About Loova Ads Studio [...] ## About Loova Ads Studio

Loova Ads Studio is an innovative AI-powered platform designed to streamline the creation of high-converting advertising content. It caters to brands and marketing agencies seeking to produce engaging UGC videos, product commercials, avatar videos, and static creatives without the need for extensive video production skills. What sets Loova apart is its focus on performance-driven ads; it emphasizes not just aesthetic appeal but also effectiveness, helping users craft ads that drive conversions at a remarkably low cost—under $2 per ad. The platform's all-in-one approach simplifies the creative process, enabling rapid deployment of tailored ad assets suitable for social media, e-commerce, and digital marketing campaigns.

## What is URL to Video AI Converter?

AI-powered URL-to-Video tool turns a single product link into a complete, ready-to-use video ad. By analyzing the product page, Loova automatically extracts key information, generates compelling hooks, builds visuals and assembles everything into a high-performing ad creative designed to drive conversions.

Features

## Core Features of AI URL to Video Maker [...] Build Your Ad Asset Library in Loova Ads Studio

### Build Your Ad Asset Library in Loova Ads Studio

Every Product Kit can become the foundation for more than one campaign. Inside Loova Ads Studio, you can use Loova  AI Ad Generator to generate and organize video ads, image ads, product visuals, UGC creatives, and social content in one place.

Steps

## How to Use AI Link to Video Converter?

1

### Paste Product Link

Paste a product URL from Shopify, Amazon, or TikTok Shop. Loova automatically extracts product images, titles, descriptions into a structured Product Kit. Review and edit the information before moving to the next step.

2

### Choose Ad Style [...] Generate, Test, and Scale Ad Variations Faster

### Generate, Test, and Scale Ad Variations Faster

Turn one product URL into multiple video ad variations with different hooks, avatars, formats, and visual styles. Create more test-ready creatives in less time, quickly finding the angles that work best for your audience, and scale creative production without extra manual work.

Premium Visuals Powered by Leading AI Models

### Premium Visuals Powered by Leading AI Models

Loova combines advanced AI image and video models like GPT Image 2 and Seedance 2.0 to generate realistic product shots and stylish scenes. Every video is designed to look polished, engaging, and ready for real marketing campaigns.

Build Your Ad Asset Library in Loova Ads Studio

results.title: Loova AI: Your AI Creative Studio
results.content:
That frustration is what led us to build Loova Agents.

We wanted to create something that behaves more like a creative director than just another AI generator.   
With Loova Agents, the goal is simple:

understand the intent behind your idea

plan scenes before generation

generate visuals and BGM together

keep the whole project inside one infinite canvas

let creators shape stories visually, not tab by tab

People are already using it for product ads, AI short films, talking avatar videos, UGC style content, and more.

We’re still very early. Still learning every day. Still building with the community.

If you try it, I’d genuinely love to hear your thoughts. A lot of what we build next will come directly from user feedback. Here is a quick link to explore: 

SomitraSR from Timidlly [...] @jim\_jeffers Yes, this is something we’re building.

The goal is to let teams reuse creative direction like brand voice, reference shots, and style notes, so future videos can start with the right context without writing a long prompt every time.

This consistency layer is especially important for product and UGC videos.

Jim Jeffers

@heymilo That makes sense — the “consistency layer” is probably where this becomes a real workflow tool instead of a one-off generator.

One small UX suggestion: make the saved direction cite its source/examples, not just store a blob of preferences. Teams will trust it more if they can see “this came from these three prior ads / this brand note / this rejected style,” especially when a video starts to feel off.

Milo
Loova AI

Loova AI [...] Anbang Xu
Loova AI

Loova AI

@rockzhang Yes, that’s exactly what we’re building. The goal is for the agent to act like a director and marketing expert, helping you turn a rough idea into a high-quality video quickly and easily.

Milo
Loova AI

Loova AI

@rockzhang That’s exactly what we want to make easier.

You shouldn’t need to know how to write a script, plan shots, or choose the right tools. With Loova, you can start from a rough creative goal, and the agent will turn it into a story structure, scenes, visuals, and a video workflow automatically.

You can still jump in and adjust things, but the heavy lifting should be handled by the agent.

results.title: 50 High-Converting AI Static Ads in 90 Seconds (The Exact Workflow)
results.content: instant clarity and remove confusion in under 1 second. Then you have the testimonial ads. These work because they build trust. Instead of the brand making claims, real customers make them. That's social proof and it's one of the strongest conversion triggers in advertising. Next, we have the before-and-after ads. These focus entirely on transformation. They show the problem, then they show the outcome. People naturally think in terms of progress, so these ads make the results tangible before someone even clicks. Then you have the humor ads. At first glance, they look like entertainment, but that's not why they work. They work because they interrupt the scroll. Most ads look like ads. These look like memes, text messages, Reddit-style posts, or native social content. They first earn [...] and then they wonder why the ads feel generic. So what I do instead is upload the entire cloud brief directly into the agent. Now the AI understands the customer, the pain points, the positioning, and that before it creates anything. Then I add the competitors. This lets the AI track their ads, analyze patterns, and identify what's currently converting in that market. A few months ago, competitor research took me hours manually scrolling through Meta Ads Library, saving references, identifying hooks, building creative concepts from scratch. Now I do all of that with one prompt. Analyze the top performing static ads from my competitors in the last 7 days. Identify the best hooks, visual patterns, and creative angles. Then generate 20 static ads inspired by those winning concepts, and [...] exact prompt in the description below. Now, here's why this matters. Instead of creating random AI ads, you're creating ads based on actual customer psychology. That shift alone changes everything about your ads quality. Now, we move into the actual ad creation, and that is where I use Superscale. Think of it as an AI ad creation agent. I create a new brand based in the Shopify store's URL. For this example, I'm using Carpe, a deodorant brand doing over $1 million a month. After I add the store's URL, Super Skill starts analyzing the brand, the URL, and even the competitors. And on the first run, it already pulled Carpe's product directly into the workspace. But here's where most people mess up. They give the AI almost zero context, and then they wonder why the ads feel generic. So what I

# Loova AI
For all creative minds.
Technology, Information and Internet • N/A • 19 followers • 2-10 employees

## Overview
Loova AI is a creative playground where ideas turn into scroll-stopping videos in minutes. From viral UGC ads to AI films, anime clips, and social content, you can go from “I have an idea” to “it’s already live” without touching complex editing tools. At the core is Loova Agents, just talk to it like a creative partner. It helps you generate, remix, and shape videos and visuals through simple conversation, so making content feels less like editing and more like creating. Fast, experimental, and built for creators who move at internet speed.
